media:group/media:description: Modernizing apps always sounds great… until you actually have to do it. Matt Soucoup breaks down how GitHub Copilot can analyze your project, generate a plan, and even create task lists to help you move from legacy .NET to modern .NET faster. It moves you from a “someday project” to “let’s actually ship this.”

Learn more: https://msft.it/6053Q0gRh
